zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Kent於1605年5月24日出生在英國哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普時，他的父親Thomas Kent48歲，母親Ellen Pyle45歲。他於1637年8月10日與Margery Ann Norris在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1646年住在英國英格蘭爾南特維其且於1679年住在美國新澤西州米德萊可伍德布里奇 堂史普。他去世於1679年9月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西米德萊可伍德布里奇 堂史普享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Kent于1605年5月24日出生在英国哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普时，他的父亲Thomas Kent48岁，母亲Ellen Pyle45岁。他于1637年8月10日与Margery Ann Norris在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1646年住在英国英格兰爾南特維其且于1679年住在美国新泽西州米德萊可伍德布里奇 堂史普。他去世于1679年9月24日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加新泽西米德萊可伍德布里奇 堂史普享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from the county of Kent. The surname is also established in Ireland, where English bearers of this name settled in Meath, in the 13th century. The name has been Gaelicized as Ceannt.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Kent was born on 24 May 1605, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, his father, Thomas Kent, was 48 and his mother, Ellen Pyle, was 45. He married Margery Ann Norris on 10 August 1637, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1646 and Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, United States in 1679. He died on 24 September 1679, in Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Kent est né le 24 mai 1605, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Kent, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Ellen Pyle, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margery Ann Norris le 10 août 1637, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1646 et à Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, États-Unis en 1679. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1679, à Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Kent am 24. Mai 1605 in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kent 48 und seine Mutter Ellen Pyle 45. Er hat am 10. August 1637 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Margery Ann Norris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1646 hat er in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und 1679 in Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 24. September 1679 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Kent è nato il il 24 maggio 1605 nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Kent, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Pyle, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margery Ann Norris il 10 agosto 1637, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1646 e nel Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1679. Morì il 24 settembre 1679, nel Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Kentが1605年5月24日にイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップで生まれた時，父Thomas Kentは48歳，母Ellen Pyleは45歳であった。1637年8月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでMargery Ann Norrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1646年にはイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチに，1679年にはアメリカ合衆国ニュージャージー州ミッドレセックスウッドブリッジ トウンシュイップに住んでいた。彼は1679年9月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュージャージー州ミッドレセックスウッドブリッジ トウンシュイップで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Kent(이)가 1605년 5월 24일 영국 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kent(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Pyle(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1637년 8월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Margery Ann Norris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1646년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서, 1679년도에 미국 뉴저지 주 미들레세스 우드브리지 타운시프에서 살았다. 그는 1679년 9월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴저지 주 미들레세스 우드브리지 타운시프에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Kent nasceu em 24 de maio de 1605, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Kent, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Pyle, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Ann Norris em 10 de agosto de 1637, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1646 e em Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, Nova Jérsei, Estados Unidos da América em 1679. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1679, em Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Kent родился 24 мая 1605 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Kent было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Pyle, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Ann Norris 10 августа 1637 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1646 году и в местности вудбридж тоуншип, миддлесекс, Нью-Джерси, Соединенные штаты в 1679 году. Он умер 24 сентября 1679 г. в местности вудбридж тоуншип, миддлесекс, Нью-Джерси, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 74 лет.

es.Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, Unite: Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Kent nació el 24 de mayo de 1605, en Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Kent, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Ellen Pyle, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margery Ann Norris el 10 de agosto de 1637, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1646 y en Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, Nueva Jersey, Estados Unidos en 1679. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1679, en Woodbridge Township, Middlesex, New Jersey, British Colonial America, a la edad de 74 años.
